name: Alpha Vantage
what_it_does: Free and premium REST API for real-time and historical stock prices, forex rates, cryptocurrency data, and technical indicators, widely used for financial analysis and trading applications.
use_cases: Fetching real-time and historical stock prices for financial analysis agents
Retrieving forex exchange rates for currency conversion in automated workflows
Getting cryptocurrency prices and OHLCV data for crypto trading bots
Computing technical indicators (RSI, MACD, SMA) via built-in indicator endpoints
Earnings, balance sheet, and income statement data for fundamental analysis agents
not_for: Ultra-low latency trading (sub-millisecond) — not designed for HFT
Real-time Level 2 order book data — only top-of-book available
High-frequency polling on free tier (5 requests/minute is very limiting)
best_when: You need a free, accessible starting point for stock/forex/crypto data in a financial agent or prototype, or you need affordable access to historical fundamentals and technical indicators.
avoid_when: You need real-time professional-grade data with low latency, or your agent makes more than a few hundred API calls per day on the free tier.

auth.notes: Single API key passed as query parameter. Free tier key immediately available with email signup. Premium keys have higher rate limits and access to additional endpoints.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: 25 requests/day (updated from 5/min to daily cap in 2024), 15-20 min delayed data
pricing.paid_tiers: Premium from $50/month for 75 requests/min; $120+/month for faster and fundamentals
pricing.notes: Free tier was popular but became more restrictive over time. The daily cap of 25 requests is quite low for any real workflow. Premium plans add real-time data and much higher rate limits.

performance.rate_limits: Free: ~25 requests/day; Premium: 75-1200 requests/minute depending on plan

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: API returns HTTP 200 even for errors — errors are embedded in JSON response body as 'Note' or 'Information' strings rather than HTTP error codes. Agents must parse response body to detect errors, not just check status code.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All operations are read-only GET requests — fully idempotent by nature.
known_agent_gotchas: CRITICAL: Rate limit errors return HTTP 200 with a message in the JSON body — agents that only check status codes will silently receive rate limit messages instead of data
Free tier rate limits (25/day) are so restrictive that any real agent workflow requires paid plan
Data is 15-20 minutes delayed on free tier — real-time price agents must use premium
No official SDK — agents must implement their own HTTP client and response parsing
Some endpoints have been deprecated without clear migration path
CSV and JSON response formats available — default varies by endpoint
API key passed as query parameter (not header) — visible in server logs and browser history

security_score_components.security_notes: Stock/financial data API. Simple API key. Read-only market data — low security risk. Free tier rate limits are strict. No PII involved.
